tasks.label: Backend: Ensure dependencies
args: $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $backend=Join-Path $workspace 'backend'; $venv=Join-Path $backend '.venv'; $pythonExe=Join-Path $venv 'Scripts\python.exe'; $requirements=Join-Path $backend 'requirements.txt'; $stamp=Join-Path $venv '.requirements.stamp'; if (!(Test-Path -LiteralPath $pythonExe)) { if (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & py -3.10 -m venv $venv 2>$null; if (!(Test-Path -LiteralPath $pythonExe)) { & py -m venv $venv } } elseif (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & python -m venv $venv } else { Write-Error 'Python 3.10+ is required to create backend/.venv.'; exit 1 } }; $needsInstall = -not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $stamp); if (-not $needsInstall) { $needsInstall = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $requirements).LastWriteTimeUtc -gt (Get-Item -LiteralPath $stamp).LastWriteTimeUtc }; if ($needsInstall) { & $pythonExe -m pip install --upgrade pip; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $pythonExe -m pip install -r $requirements; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Set-Content -LiteralPath $stamp -Value ((Get-Date).ToString('o')) }; exit 0

tasks.label: Frontend: Ensure dependencies
args:
$workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $frontend=Join-Path $workspace 'frontend'; $nextCmd=Join-Path $frontend 'node_modules\.bin
ext.cmd'; $nextBin=Join-Path $frontend 'node_modules
ext\dist in
ext'; $lockFile=Join-Path $frontend 'package-lock.json'; $stamp=Join-Path $frontend 'node_modules\.install.stamp'; $needsInstall = (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $nextCmd)) -or (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $nextBin)) -or (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $stamp)); if (-not $needsInstall) { $needsInstall = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $lockFile).LastWriteTimeUtc -gt (Get-Item -LiteralPath $stamp).LastWriteTimeUtc }; if ($needsInstall) { Push-Location $frontend; try { & npm.cmd ci; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Set-Content -LiteralPath $stamp -Value ((Get-Date).ToString('o')) } finally { Pop-Location } }; exit 0

tasks.label: Backend: Stop port 8000
args: $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $expectedRoot=[System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $workspace 'backend')).ToLowerInvariant(); $foreign=@(); Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $listenerPid=$_; $proc=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ('ProcessId = ' + $listenerPid) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $proc) { return }; $cmd=''; if ($proc.CommandLine) { $cmd=$proc.CommandLine.ToLowerInvariant() }; $name=''; if ($proc.Name) { $name=$proc.Name.ToLowerInvariant() }; $isUgnayBackend=(($cmd -like ('*' + $expectedRoot + '*')) -and (($cmd -like '*uvicorn*') -or ($cmd -like '*app.main:app*'))) -or (($name -eq 'python.exe') -and ($cmd -like '*uvicorn*') -and ($cmd -like '*app.main:app*')); if ($isUgnayBackend) { Stop-Process -Id $listenerPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { $foreign += $listenerPid } }; if ($foreign.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Port 8000 is already in use by non-Ugnay process(es): ' + (($foreign | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ', ')); exit 1 }; exit 0

tasks.label: Frontend: Stop port 3000
args: $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $expectedRoot=[System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $workspace 'frontend')).ToLowerInvariant(); $foreign=@(); Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $listenerPid=$_; $proc=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ('ProcessId = ' + $listenerPid) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $proc) { return }; $cmd=''; if ($proc.CommandLine) { $cmd=$proc.CommandLine.ToLowerInvariant() }; if (($cmd -like ('*' + $expectedRoot + '*')) -and (($cmd -like '*next*dev*') -or ($cmd -like '*dev-clean.mjs*') -or ($cmd -like '*-p 3000*'))) { Stop-Process -Id $listenerPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { $foreign += $listenerPid } }; if ($foreign.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Port 3000 is already in use by non-Ugnay process(es): ' + (($foreign | Sort-Object -Unique) -join ', ')); exit 1 }; exit 0
